query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `tiktok_csv_import_history` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `brandId` int NOT NULL,
  `fileName` varchar(512) NOT NULL,
  `fileUrl` text,
  `fileKey` varchar(512),
  `totalRows` int DEFAULT 0,
  `importedRows` int DEFAULT 0,
  `skippedRows` int DEFAULT 0,
  `errorRows` int DEFAULT 0,
  `totalSales` bigint DEFAULT 0,
  `totalPartnerCommission` bigint DEFAULT 0,
  `totalCreatorCommission` bigint DEFAULT 0,
  `dateRangeStart` timestamp NULL,
  `dateRangeEnd` timestamp NULL,
  `status` enum('processing','completed','failed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'processing',
  `errorMessage` text,
  `uploadedBy` int NOT NULL,
  `uploadedByName` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `tiktok_csv_import_history` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `brandId` int NOT NULL,
  `fileName` varchar(512) NOT NULL,
  `fileUrl` text,
  `fileKey` varchar(512),
  `totalRows` int DEFAULT 0,
  `importedRows` int DEFAULT 0,
  `skippedRows` int DEFAULT 0,
  `errorRows` int DEFAULT 0,
  `totalSales` bigint DEFAULT 0,
  `totalPartnerCommission` bigint DEFAULT 0,
  `totalCreatorCommission` bigint DEFAULT 0,
  `dateRangeStart` timestamp NULL,
  `dateRangeEnd` timestamp NULL,
  `status` enum('processing','completed','failed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'processing',
  `errorMessage` text,
  `uploadedBy` int NOT NULL,
  `uploadedByName` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
